attributes.service.name: Logical name of this repository/service; set it when exporting traces beyond this repo.
attributes.harness.task.id: Task id from TASKS.json, e.g. F001.
attributes.harness.run.kind: Run kind recorded by scripts/run_with_signals.py: verification|test|e2e|benchmark.
attributes.process.exit_code: Integer exit code returned by the wrapped command.
attributes.test.status: passed|failed, derived from the wrapped command's exit code.
